MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-11-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-18-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ROOM 503A, JUDGE PRO-TEM GAIL DEKREON, SSAWYER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF & DEFT PRESENT, BOTH IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTIAGO, ROSANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 68 SIXTH STREET, ROOM 	A, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAR-03-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.
